communityHero.label: Community Empowerment
communityHero.heading: Building Growth Through Culture, Collaboration, and Opportunity.
communityHero.subheading: Afari Trails believes meaningful experiences should uplift local communities, preserve cultural identity, and create long-term impact rooted in partnership and respect.
communityHero.imageAlt: Artisan hands at work in warm natural light

communityPhilosophy.label: Our Philosophy
communityPhilosophy.statement: We believe communities should not exist at the edges of exploration experiences, but at the center of them.

items.title: Local Employment
items.description: Supporting guides, hospitality teams, creatives, and local expertise across every venture.

items.title: Cultural Preservation
items.description: Protecting stories, traditions, languages, and craftsmanship for generations to come.

items.title: Artisan Collaborations
items.description: Working with local makers and designers to create goods rooted in place and identity.

items.title: Youth Opportunities
items.description: Future mentorship in storytelling, tourism, conservation, and creative education.

items.title: Women-Led Initiatives
items.description: Supporting women entrepreneurs, artisans, and local leadership across our ecosystem.

items.title: Sustainable Economic Growth
items.description: Creating enduring value through ethical partnerships — not one-time charity.

communityStories.label: Local Stories
communityStories.heading: Voices from the trail.
communityStories.intro: The people who shape Afari — guides, artisans, storytellers, and partners whose knowledge grounds every journey.

profiles.name: James Mwamba
profiles.quote: Growing up near the river shaped how I understand nature and storytelling — every expedition carries that memory.

profiles.name: Amara Ndlovu
profiles.quote: Our patterns hold generations. When travelers learn their meaning, culture travels farther than any object.

profiles.name: David Chisenga
profiles.quote: I document what the land teaches — light, patience, and the quiet moments most people rush past.

communityCraftsmanship.label: African Craftsmanship
communityCraftsmanship.heading: Made by hand. Rooted in place.
communityCraftsmanship.body: Textiles, weaving, natural materials, and traditional techniques — craftsmanship that connects our store, archive, eco lodge vision, and brand identity to the hands and histories behind them.

communityInitiatives.label: Future Initiatives
communityInitiatives.heading: Directions we are building toward.
communityInitiatives.intro: Conceptual today — foundational tomorrow. Initiatives shaped with community leaders and creative partners.

communityPartners.label: Partnerships & Collaboration
communityPartners.heading: Relationships built on trust.
communityPartners.body: Afari Trails seeks long-term relationships rooted in trust, mutual respect, and meaningful collaboration across Africa's communities and creative industries.

communityCta.heading: Grow With the Journey
communityCta.body: Whether you lead community programs, create, guide, or share our belief in shared value — we welcome the conversation.
